name: superzej-acp-extension
description: superzej's pi package: the ACP bridge extension (superzej-acp.ts) + the superzej-house skill. pi (>=0.80) bundles @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent and resolves it for the extension at load time, so NO install is required to run; the dependency is declared only for editor type-checking. The extension is additive — it does not override pi's built-in tools; it observes via session/update, routes the model via the proxy, and exposes superzej's house tools via MCP-over-ACP.
